name: Apple-Chicken Salad-(marinaded)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup thawed frozen apple juice concentrate
4 medium skinless, boneless chicken breast halves (12 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine apple juice concentrate, salad oil, soy sauce, white wine vinegar, and crushed savory.
2. Place chicken breasts in a plastic bag in a shallow dish. Pour marinade over chicken. Seal the bag.
3. Refrigerate about 4 hours, turning once to ensure even coating.
4. Remove meat from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Broil chicken on an unheated broiler pan for 8-10 minutes or grill directly over medium-hot coals for 20-25 minutes, brushing occasionally with reserved marinade. Turn once during cooking time.
6. Cut chicken into strips. Cover and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
7. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise (or salad dressing), apple juice concentrate, salt, and pepper for the dressing.
8. In a large bowl, combine torn romaine lettuce, red leaf lettuce, chopped pecans or walnuts, and red onion rings.
9. Divide salad greens among 4 dinner plates. Arrange chicken and apples over the greens.
10. Drizzle dressing over the salads.
Makes 4 main-dish salads.
Calories: 705
Protein: 31 g
Carbohydrates: 32 g
Fat: 52 g
Cholesterol: 98 mg
Sodium: 959 mg
Potassium: 782 mg
